# After remove 55 (slide 111): f underflows; right sibling g has only the
# minimum, so f and g merge, pulling key 60 down from parent c. c drops to one
# key [75] with children f=[60,70] and h=[80]. (Old node g is abandoned.)
#
#                       [50]
#                     /      \
#                 [30]        [75]
#                /    \      /    \
#            [10]   [40] [60,70]  [80]
root 1
1  1  2  50 3
2  1  4  30 5
3  1  6  75 8
4  1  0  10 0
5  1  0  40 0
6  2  0  60 0  70 0
8  1  0  80 0
